CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 19, 2002
Off Calendar Dec-19-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Loretta Najera. James C. Driscoll, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Sallie Mae Servicing, L.P. The Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: 28,973.11; Interest:2,226.91; Attorney Fees: $1,000.00; Costs: 247.95 for a total judgment of $32,447.97. Order signed in open court.
